  "claims": [
    "AB 469 provides law enforcement with better tools to crack down on looting and impersonation of emergency personnel during wildfires and other emergencies.",
    "AB 469 allows prosecutors to seek stronger penalties for looting and impersonation of emergency personnel.",
    "The legislation aims to close existing loopholes that can hinder prosecution.",
    "AB 469 is designed to better protect communities during the recovery and rebuilding process following natural disasters.",
    "Prosecutors will be able to seek felony charges for looting and impersonating emergency personnel, including theft from fire-damaged or evacuated homes.",

    "Recent incidents highlighted the need for stronger protections against looting during evacuations."
